title: Google strikes back! Gemini Omni, AI glasses, new models
summary: Gemini Omni is Google's new multimodal AI model announced at Google I/O. It processes text, audio, image, and video inputs and outputs natively. The model represents an advancement in Google's Gemini family of large language models.
